title: ShapeAXI: Shape Analysis Exploration and Interpretability
description: ShapeAXI is a deep-learning framework for shape analysis, classification, segmentation, regression, and interpretability of 3D surfaces (e.g. anatomical meshes). It bundles training, prediction, evaluation, and explainability (Grad-CAM) command-line tools built on PyTorch Lightning, PyTorch3D, MONAI, and VTK.

creators.name: Prieto, Juan Carlos
creators.affiliation: University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill
